---
title: "exception handing"
format: html
engine: julia
execute:
  daemon: false
julia:
  exeflags: ["--project=.@"]
---

# exception handing

```{julia}
function handingexception(x)
    try
        return sqrt(x[-1])
    catch e
    if isa(e, DomainError) # 数学定义域错误
        sqrt(complex(x[-1], 0))
    elseif isa(e, BoundsError) # 索引越界
        sqrt(x)
    else
        println("I did my best.")
    end
    finally
        println("I have tried to do sqrt operation to x")
    end
end

x = 1im
println("The sqrt of x is $(handingexception(x))")
```
